summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Policies module and Education & Experience module. All 9 features tested successfully. Backend: 17/17 tests passed. Frontend: All UI flows verified.

policies_page_admin.description: Policies page loads correctly for Admin. Shows 3 policies: Leave Policy (HR), IT Team Policy (Department), Research Unit Policy (Department).

policies_page_employee.description: Policies page loads correctly for Employee. All 3 policies visible and accessible.

policy_details_leave.description: Leave Policy detail modal shows expandable sections: Leave Types & Entitlements (with table format showing days), Leave Application Process, Leave Restrictions, Leave Encashment.

policy_details_it.description: IT Team Policy modal shows 5 sections: Working Hours & Flexibility, Code Standards & Practices, Equipment & Resources, Security Requirements, Career Development.

policy_details_research.description: Research Unit Policy modal shows 5 sections: Research Standards, Intellectual Property, Research Funding & Resources, Project Management, Safety & Compliance.

employee_education_experience_page.description: Employee Education & Experience page displays correctly. Shows Education (Graduation - ABC University, 2020) and Experience (Junior Developer - XYZ Corp) entries.

employee_crud_education.description: Employee can add/edit/delete education entries via PUT API. Add button hidden after verification (correct behavior). Test verified via backend API tests.

employee_crud_experience.description: Employee can add/edit/delete experience entries via PUT API. Add button hidden after verification (correct behavior). Test verified via backend API tests.

admin_view_education_experience.description: Admin can view employee education/experience in Employee Details dialog via 'Education & Experience' tab.

admin_verify_education.description: Admin can verify education details via POST /api/employees/{id}/verify-education. 'Verified' badge shown after verification.

admin_verify_experience.description: Admin can verify experience details via POST /api/employees/{id}/verify-experience. 'Verified' badge shown after verification.

seed_data_creation: Used existing test employee EMP0055 with education (Graduation, ABC University, 2020) and experience (Junior Developer, XYZ Corp, 2020-2022). Education and experience both verified during testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Policies module: 3 policies seeded (Leave, IT, Research) accessible at GET /api/policies. Each policy has content.sections with expandable accordion items. Education & Experience module: Employee profile endpoint at GET/PUT /api/employee-profile/education-experience. Admin view at GET /api/employees/{id}/education-experience. Admin verify endpoints: POST /api/employees/{id}/verify-education and verify-experience. Once verified, employee cannot edit (returns 400). Test employee EMP0055 has both education and experience verified.
